creator: mike@urgle.com
text:
Comment on attachment 246796
patch to upgrade from 10.0 to 12.2

diff --git a/net-im/gotosocial/Makefile b/net-im/gotosocial/Makefile
index 7b4c3d5ec1bc..d39495b0b357 100644
--- a/net-im/gotosocial/Makefile
+++ b/net-im/gotosocial/Makefile
@@ -1,7 +1,6 @@
 PORTNAME=	gotosocial
 DISTVERSIONPREFIX=	v
-DISTVERSION=	0.10.0
-PORTREVISION=	2
+DISTVERSION=	0.12.2
 CATEGORIES=	net-im
 MASTER_SITES?=	https://github.com/${GH_ACCOUNT}/${PORTNAME}/releases/download/v${DISTVERSION}/:web
 DISTFILES?=	${PORTNAME}_${DISTVERSION}_web-assets.tar.gz:web
diff --git a/net-im/gotosocial/distinfo b/net-im/gotosocial/distinfo
index 03b10341499b..99317e25431a 100644
--- a/net-im/gotosocial/distinfo
+++ b/net-im/gotosocial/distinfo
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
-TIMESTAMP = 1689752181
-SHA256 (gotosocial_0.10.0_web-assets.tar.gz) = b58aa71aa208f207fe69577f27996f86eae10ab1fc8a15989fb9e80496c482a0
-SIZE (gotosocial_0.10.0_web-assets.tar.gz) = 1362405
-SHA256 (superseriousbusiness-gotosocial-v0.10.0_GH0.tar.gz) = f9fe97e65b735e9a68fb1df4dad22165214a86d125c55e4ad9da5c97a23925ec
-SIZE (superseriousbusiness-gotosocial-v0.10.0_GH0.tar.gz) = 55761866
+TIMESTAMP = 1701705660
+SHA256 (gotosocial_0.12.2_web-assets.tar.gz) = bc48cbf69645052b77d99a96646bc6d75d870399ea93063ab8e418de105458de
+SIZE (gotosocial_0.12.2_web-assets.tar.gz) = 1359497
+SHA256 (superseriousbusiness-gotosocial-v0.12.2_GH0.tar.gz) = ba1a710f8e643560de167b44172cc50d7327acf53328c4e75b54109d16f5e27f
+SIZE (superseriousbusiness-gotosocial-v0.12.2_GH0.tar.gz) = 55151443
diff --git a/net-im/gotosocial/pkg-plist b/net-im/gotosocial/pkg-plist
index 7c50e8150baf..62d38779707c 100644
--- a/net-im/gotosocial/pkg-plist
+++ b/net-im/gotosocial/pkg-plist
@@ -1,6 +1,7 @@
 @sample etc/gotosocial/config.yaml.sample
 %%WWWDIR%%/template/about.tmpl
 %%WWWDIR%%/template/header.tmpl
+%%WWWDIR%%/template/tag.tmpl
 %%WWWDIR%%/template/thread.tmpl
 %%WWWDIR%%/template/frontend.tmpl
 %%WWWDIR%%/template/oob.tmpl
@@ -29,6 +30,7 @@
 %%WWWDIR%%/assets/default_avatars/GoToSocial_icon6.png
 %%WWWDIR%%/assets/mastodon.svg
 %%WWWDIR%%/assets/logo.svg
+%%WWWDIR%%/assets/feditext.svg
 %%WWWDIR%%/assets/plyr.svg
 %%WWWDIR%%/assets/default_header.png
 %%WWWDIR%%/assets/fonts/OFL.txt
@@ -59,6 +61,7 @@
 %%WWWDIR%%/assets/dist/settings-style.css
 %%WWWDIR%%/assets/dist/base.css
 %%WWWDIR%%/assets/dist/frontend.js
+%%WWWDIR%%/assets/dist/tag.css
 %%WWWDIR%%/assets/swagger.yaml
 bin/gotosocial
 share/doc/gotosocial/LICENSE
